name: Yosen Whirlwind
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>仙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>旋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぷう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card by paying 800 LP. Once per turn, if a face-up "Yosenju" monster you control returns to the hand (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card your opponent controls; return it to the hand. During your End Phase, unless this effect was activated this turn (and was not negated), destroy this card.
eff: Activate this card by paying 800 LP. Once per turn, if a face-up "Yosenju" monster you control returns to the hand (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card your opponent controls; return it to the hand. During your End Phase, unless this effect was activated this turn (and was not negated), destroy this card.

action: Activates if returned from the field to the hand
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
